_comment: Naive (hand-tuned) weights for the deterministic linear scorer. These are the ACTIVE fallback: weights are NOT trained in this repo (out of scope). A learned config/score_weights.json (logistic coefficients over the SAME build_feature_vector, see docs/calibration.md) would take precedence. Each feature value is normalized to [0,1]; weights sum to 100 so score = sum(weight*value) lands in 0-100.
